items.speaker: Noah
items.text: Yes. See you tomorrow.

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: See you tomorrow.

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: I go home with my sister.
items.translation: Voy a casa con mi hermana.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L20-05 - E1205 - Emma - I go home with my sister.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: I drink tea in the morning.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L28-04 - E1284 - Emma - I drink tea in the morning.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: I sometimes go to the library.
items.translation: A veces voy a la biblioteca.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L30-04 - E1304 - Emma - I sometimes go to the library.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: I'm going to visit my cousin.
items.translation: Voy a visitar a mi primo.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L40-02 - E1402 - Ethan - I'm going to visit my cousin.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: I'm going to study in the morning.
items.translation: Voy a estudiar por la mañana.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L40-03 - E1403 - Mia - I'm going to study in the morning.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: I'm going to watch a movie.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L40-04 - E1404 - Emma - I'm going to watch a movie.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: I'm going to play soccer.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L40-05 - E1405 - Noah - I'm going to play soccer.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: We are all going to be busy.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L40-06 - E1406 - Ethan - We are all going to be busy.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: What is the homework for tomorrow?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L47-04 - E1474 - Ethan - What is the homework for tomorrow.mp3

items.speaker: Mr. Carter
items.text: Tomorrow we are going to visit the museum.
items.translation: Mañana vamos a visitar el museo.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L48-01 - E1481 - Mr. Carter - Tomorrow we are going to visit the museum.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: I think it will be fun.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L48-06 - E1486 - Ethan - I think it will be fun.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: I missed the bus this morning.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L03-02 - E2032 - Ethan - I missed the bus this morning.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: I'm not doing anything special.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L04-04 - E2044 - Ethan - I'm not doing anything special.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: Can I go to school tomorrow?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L23-06 - E2236 - Noah - Can I go to school tomorrow.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: We'll know the results tomorrow.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L25-06 - E2256 - Mia - We'll know the results tomorrow.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: You practiced enough. You'll be fine.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L29-02 - E2292 - Mia - You practiced enough. You'll be fine.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: That's a good idea. I'll ask him tomorrow.
items.translation: Es buena idea. Le preguntaré mañana.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L45-06 - E2456 - Ethan - That's a good idea. I'll ask him tomorrow.mp3

items.speaker: Mr. Carter
items.text: Only ten students will be selected.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L47-05 - E2475 - Mr. Carter - Only ten students will be selected.mp3

items.speaker: Leo
items.text: Yes, I got it this morning.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L11-04 - BR1114 - Leo - Yes, I got it this morning.mp3

items.speaker: Nora
items.text: Is the event still happening tomorrow?

items.text: Are you coming with us tomorrow?
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L26-01 - BR1261 - Ben - Are you coming with us tomorrow.mp3

items.text: They posted an update this morning.

items.speaker: Leo
items.text: Not gonna lie, the first video was better.
items.translation: No voy a mentir: el primer video era mejor.

items.speaker: Leo
items.text: I will. I feel ready for the next book.
